idea: Tracking movie ticket sales to predict consumer sentiment
behavior: Consumers spend more on discretionary entertainment when they are confident about the economy.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary stocks are sensitive to changes in consumer spending and sentiment.

trade_logic.entry: If 4-week total box office revenue increases >10% vs 3 months ago
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if the 4-week average stops increasing
